gist.headline: Dirtberry Pro has sprouted
gist.blurb: Added Dirtberry Pro to the image generation lineup. It handles complex scenes and pixel art without breaking a sweat. Go paint some pixels.
gist.summary: Integrated the new dirtberry-pro image model into the API for enhanced realism and complex scene generation.
gist.impact: You can now pass dirtberry-pro as your model parameter to get upgraded, high-quality image generation capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new image model called 'dirtberry-pro'. Visual metaphors: a literal 'dirt berry' (a glowing, high-tech berry growing from soil or code), the bee mascot acting as a gardener, and the monitor robot generating high-quality images from the harvest.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny farmer's straw hat, harvesting a glowing, magical berry from a lime green (#ecf874) code-plant. A chunky monitor-head robot stands nearby holding a freshly printed, highly detailed picture. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'DIRTBERRY PRO'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful.
